_comment: Work queue consumed by tools/auto_orchestrator.py. Append objects to 'tasks' and the daemon will dispatch them to the first idle compatible host on its next poll (default every 120s). Status transitions pending -> running -> done/failed are written back automatically.

_task_schema.config: path relative to agent-multi repo root, e.g. examples/config/p4_ppo_eth_1h.json
_task_schema.requires_gpu: bool; if true, omits hosts without GPU (currently none filtered since all 3 have GPU)

tasks.notes: Fills 5th P4 combo (EURUSD SAC) for P5 ranking. 6 seeds * 500k ts, cpu. Verified running on Gamma PIDs 107029/107031/107049 — ssh returned after timeout (slow bashrc) but job launched successfully; orchestrator ssh timeout bumped 30s->120s.
SAC BTC iter8 (k_sl=2.5/k_tp=4.0). Verified running on Dragon PIDs 2219062/2219064/2219082; ssh timed out >120s but launch succeeded. GPU 714MB used at 71%.
PPO ETH iter8 (k_tp 4.0->3.0, ent_coef 0.02->0.01). Verified running on Dragon PIDs 2219282/2219284/2219302; ssh timed out >120s but launch succeeded.
EURUSD PPO iter9: tighten k_sl/k_tp 2.5/4.0 -> 2.0/2.5 to force more round-trips after iter8ext anemic trade counts (2/53/14) and negative returns on s3-s5. CPU, Omega.
